Cloak of the Maelstrom  
 

Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 11
STR: +3 DEX: +10 STA: +6 INT: +5 HP: +55
WT: 20.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Cloak of the Maelstrom
Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 11
STR: +3 DEX: +10 STA: +6 INT: +5 HP: +55
WT: 20.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:2400
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 04:24:07
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 15,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Dragon Heads

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
Dlammaz Stormslayer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel


Uploaded August 23rd, 2018 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Happy Beastlord
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2002 at 5:58 PM Rating: Decent
Treesong
View User Forum
Scholar
169 posts
Just got this cloak on a Raid, and as a Beastlord who can not afford a Lodizal Shield yet (they go for about 13 k on my server), I am very happy with this item. Sure is an upgrade to my Kunzar cloak. :D And my Str as a TRoll is around 220 now self buffed at level 52, so weight no problem. I hardly ever get encumbered with this char anyway. Now take my woodelf druid on the other hand.... :p

Cheers!
▲ Page top

18 posts

4 posts

GroderMcdougal
View User Forum
104 posts
20 weight isnt that bad for a necro. Maybe im just weird but my gear atm weighs 58 out of 98 str hehe, hp is what i want out of this item but 5int is just a bonus.

# Mar 03 2002 at 8:14 AM Rating: Decent

156 posts
20.0 wt. is quite a bit but at 208 unbuffed str wtf does it matter, AWESOME item anyway you look at it

QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2002 at 11:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777428224
27 posts
lol no its not good look at cloak of shadows 12ac 13dex 0.00 WIEGHT even if u have that much str its not to convenient. the only classes this is good for is int classes and most can not afford 20wieght if u can great get it for tanks if u get this ur outta ur mind.( no offence)

# Jul 26 2003 at 2:21 AM Rating: Default

274 posts
Yeah, and I suppose it'd be totally useless to my Ogre SK, who uses ALL of that, and not JUST the dex...
▲ Page top
RE: Ooops
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2003 at 10:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784045996
17 posts
You're an idiot honestly. I am a 56 Epic wizard and I use this cloak. You said we cannot afford the weight, but I have 129 str, as a WIZARD and NEVER use NEAR that much. I love this cloak, it's a lot better than buying some 6k piece of crap for 5 int.
▲ Page top
RE: Ooops
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2002 at 1:32 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766204325
44 posts
hey johny, fyi as a rogue I would sac 1ac and 3dex for 55 hps, 3 str, and the 30 or so hps i would get from the 6 stam. basically this is a 11ac 3 str 80 hps item for your back. man, thats GREAT for any non MT melee (who i would assume would prefer ancient seahorse hide cloak, chetari bonecrafted shield or lodizal shell shield) For my rogue who needs hps, str and decent ac this would be a very nice replacement for my spidey fur. Either this or seahorse hide probably. Would prefer to have this as with evade im rarely taking melee damage but often get nuked as soon as a mob DOES aggro me or AE cast so 80 effective hps would be very welcome. Now my warrior wears a seahorse hide cloak for the sheer AC and 25 hps. Anyhow, just thought id broaden your horizons just a bit, or try to. BTW rogue is usually 110-150 of 210-220 unbuffed STR with 900 ish AC and 1600 unbuffed hps. (hes 50ish level)

Warrior is 55 with 1100 AC 2600 hps both unbuffed.

▲ Page top
RE: Ooops
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2002 at 8:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774099254
View User Forum
73 posts
Agree 100% with Mang ..

I wear a shimmering Terrorhide cloak on my halfling ranger. Being able to wear a cloak that not only preserves the hp bonus I have, but adds to it, then boosts up my dex for those criticals all at the cost -1 str and +20 weight ... jeesh where do I sign up? Besides my ranger has over 200 STR as it is, im not tooo worried about weight considering he rarely goes over 100

QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 2:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965845905
12 posts
wait wait wait, back up to the person that said they were offered 2 lammy's, 2 velium diamond rings, and 10k for this cloak, are you out of your damn mind! thats probably 27-30k in items and cash for a 12k cloak, i just dont get some people
▲ Page top
Maelstrom vs Rygorr Oracles Cloak
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2001 at 11:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247258996
2 posts
I just got a Maelstrom Cloak last night.. its a sweet little cloak and the stats are great, but yeah.. the weight is horrific. If I didn't have a tinker bag and all weight reduc bags on me, I would have given it to a guild mate.

I have a Cloak of Rygorr Oracles as well. Thats a sweet cloak in of itself. Only thing is.. ya don't get the mega dex/sta boost. The HP is welcome, and the INT boost is nice plus for us casters. It kinda stinks giving up the +10vs cold and +5vs magic from the Oracle. S'why I plan on keeping that cloak handy for uber mob raids and such where resists are key.

I got a Belt of Fire the other week.. the combination of these two items shot my stats up through the roof. Its cool to have a Sta, Dex, and Wis over 100 as a Wizard. I was being banged on by crap in SolB the other day.. i was dodging hits left and right and when crap got bad.. i managed to get that gate spell off while getting the crap beat out of me. Whew.

Dolomite
Wizard, 54.
▲ Page top
dont flame me but
QuoteReply
# May 05 2001 at 12:06 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591759888631
67 posts
thats a huge caster cloak, is it true you can get this from killing him? I might just have to do some experimenting with snare and CoH and FD and see if I cant just get him solo to bank mwahhhahahahaha.
▲ Page top
not only a quest
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2001 at 5:20 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You can kill Dlammaz Stormslayer to get the cloak aswell.. he's about lvl 61. a few groups of low/mid 50ies have No problem takn him down..
when he is alone.. but bring his guards with him and expect your *** handed to you. but it's a fun fight.

Sendibik Insanus
Necromancer
Bertoxxulous

QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2001 at 1:27 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
With 6 wt reduction bags (including tinker), I only used up 60 stone out of 101 stone (101 str) for my high-elf wiz.

The extra 11ac and 55hp is really cool, not to forget the 10 dex & 6 sta over Mystic Robe. I got an offer for 2 lam, 2 vel diamond rings and 10k from a SK for it but I decide to keep it myself =)

Not to forget it has a cool look icon which you know it's uber stuff, heheheh.

This would be pretty nice for my wizard... Since I have my teleport spells I do not have to worry about weight very much.
